title: Li Auto Investor Relations - Financial Information
text: Li Auto Inc. maintains a comprehensive investor relations website providing access to quarterly earnings reports, annual financial statements, and SEC filings. The official investor relations portal at ir.lixiang.com serves as the authoritative source for Li Auto's financial disclosures. The company regularly reports quarterly financial results including revenue, gross profit, operating income, net income, vehicle deliveries, cash flow, and balance sheet metrics. Key financial metrics tracked include gross margin, vehicle margin, R&D expenses as a percentage of revenue, operating cash flow, and free cash flow. Annual earnings announcements typically include full-year guidance, quarterly segment performance, and management discussion of strategic initiatives. The investor relations function provides earnings call transcripts, presentation slides, and investor fact books covering company strategy, competitive positioning, product portfolio, and financial targets. Access to these official sources is essential for understanding Li Auto's earnings trends, financial health, and management commentary on market conditions, competitive dynamics, and operational performance.
